nodes.name: numpy.emath
nodes.description: Extended elementary math operations with complex-domain support.

nodes.name: sqrt
nodes.description: Square root with complex-domain extension for negative inputs.

outputs.name: sqrt_result
outputs.constraints: scalar or array square root result

nodes.type_signature: (x: np.ndarray | list | tuple | scalar) -> np.ndarray | np.number | complex | float
nodes.conceptual_summary: Compute square roots with complex output when needed.

nodes.name: log

inputs.name: x

nodes.name: log10

inputs.name: x

nodes.type_signature: (x: np.ndarray | list | tuple | scalar) -> np.ndarray | np.number | complex | float

nodes.name: logn

inputs.name: n
inputs.constraints: positive base not equal to one

inputs.name: x
inputs.constraints: nonzero scalar or array-like numeric input

nodes.type_signature: (n: float | int | complex | np.number, x: np.ndarray | list | tuple | scalar) -> np.ndarray | np.number | complex | float
nodes.conceptual_summary: Compute a principal logarithm in an arbitrary base.

nodes.name: power
nodes.description: Exponentiation with complex-domain extension for negative bases.
nodes.type_signature: (x: np.ndarray | list | tuple | scalar, p: np.ndarray | list | tuple | scalar) -> np.ndarray | np.number | complex | float
nodes.conceptual_summary: Raise a base to a power with complex output when needed.
